title: Avatar
description: User or entity representation (image + fallback initials/icon).

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text (required if the avatar conveys information).

props.name: name
props.description: Used for initials fallback and accessible labeling.

keyboard: No keyboard interaction when avatar is non-interactive.
aria: If purely decorative, use empty alt="".
If avatar conveys identity, provide meaningful alt text (e.g. person name).

must: Fallback must be present (initials or icon).
Avatar must remain recognizable at small sizes.
should: Use circular shape by default for people.
must_not: Do not rely on avatar alone to identify a user (include name in text where relevant).
